strengths: 20-year career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering demonstrates genuine breadth across the stack.
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative and ability to ship and maintain a real platform serving external users.
Recent role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, indicating some exposure to agentic tooling.
concerns: AI expertise is superficial and very recent: the only AI-related work is ~3 months of MCP code generators at re:cinq (April 2025–present); no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized external expertise in the field.

Zero strategic or advisory experience: the entire career is hands-on individual contributor work with no evidence of advising customers or partners, shaping product or cloud strategy, or operating at director-level scope.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the current title (Staff Software Engineer) sits multiple levels below the Director-level IC seniority this role explicitly requires.
response.justification: This candidate's career is built on hands-on web and infrastructure development, and the AI dimension amounts to a single line of work begun three months ago — far short of the 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms' the role requires. The Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) position is a Director-level IC expected to advise strategic customers and shape cloud AI direction; nothing in this resume — not the titles held, not the scope of impact described, not the nature of GISCollective — suggests the candidate has operated at that level or could credibly represent the company to enterprise partners on AI strategy.
